name: GRWM (Get Ready With Me)
description: Modern GRWM as codified by Alix Earle — creator gets ready for an event (makeup / outfit / work) while running a parallel storytime or commentary track. 30-90s, 9:16. 0-3s strong hook + first makeup beat. 3-60s dual-layer: visually getting ready in jump-cuts every 4-7s while the voice tells a story. Ends on a final-look reveal + cliffhanger or CTA. The two retention hooks (visual dynamic + narrative) make this one of the highest-completion formats on TikTok / Reels. Reference-required when a real brand is named (Sephora, Rare Beauty, etc.) — AGENTS.md hard rule #3.

stackSummary.keyframes: google/gemini-3-pro-image-preview via OpenRouter — character keyframes (mirror / vanity / window-front), product close-ups (hero shots), final-look reveal. Multi-ref WITH user-supplied product photo for any frame where a real brand is visible.
stackSummary.i2v: kwaivgi/kling-v3.0-pro via OpenRouter — 4-5s clips of hand-actions (foundation buffing, lip application, hair tousle), step-to-step transitions, jump-cut beats. 5-12 clips. generate_audio: false.
stackSummary.voiceover: ElevenLabs eleven_multilingual_v2 — single conversational track (storytime / commentary). voice_settings: stability 0.4, similarity 0.75 — warm and unscripted. Language follows the user's brief.
stackSummary.captions: OpenRouter whisper-1; Hormozi-yellow for high-energy storytime, MinimalCaptions bottom for calmer vlog tone.
stackSummary.music: ElevenLabs Music — optional. Low-volume ambient / lifestyle bed (lo-fi, soft pop instrumental, indie acoustic). Dipped under VO at -18 to -22 dB.

constants.structure: 0-3s hook + first product → 3-60s parallel-track (makeup beats + VO story) → 60-90s final-look reveal + cliffhanger / CTA
constants.musicMix: ambient bed dipped to -20dB under VO

variationAxes: occasion (date / wedding / investor-meeting / first-day-of-work / gym / festival / brunch)
narrative type (storytime / hot-take / vlog-update / advice / confession)
final reveal (mirror selfie / outfit-reveal walk-out / CTA cliffhanger / part-2-tomorrow)
doNotCopyLiterally: Scenario, VO storytime text, exact product brand placements, exact prompts. Vibe reference only.
referenceNotes: If the brief names a real brand (Sephora, Rare Beauty, Charlotte Tilbury, Glossier, etc.), a product reference (photo / packaging / logo) is REQUIRED at workspace/projects/<id>/assets/uploaded/. Without it, /ralph-art-director refuses (AGENTS.md hard rule #3). Generic GRWM (no named brand) does not require a reference — but a user character reference is strongly recommended for face consistency across jump-cuts.
